axis: PSI per-host threshold CALIBRATION (post-accumulation) — emit sourceable env block from live log distribution

omega-network-2.delivered: Single global HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD env (default 80) + observability TSV log to /tmp/hexa_remote_psi.log.

omega-network-3.delivered: Calibration policy (tight=p95+5/cap95; generous=max+10/floor30; ok=KEEP; gate count<50→KEEP_insufficient_data) + tool/psi_log_analyzer.sh design.

omega-network-3b.delivered: Re-derived analyzer after artifact loss; ω-network-5 audit found tool/psi_log_analyzer.sh ABSENT again (lost between cycles).
omega-network-3b.lossage_observation: Persistent loss pattern — ω-network-5 supersedes by writing the calibration logic in a .hexa tool (sweeper-safe, hexa-only-suffix compliant) instead.

omega-network-4.delivered: scripts/bin/hexa_remote env-var lookup HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD_<HOST_UPPER> + 7-col TSV (added src column) + initial-calibration recommendation block (operationally informed, NOT yet data-derived).

time_span.note: Single-day window. ω-network-3 conservative gate (count >= 50/host) satisfied for all 4 hosts despite short window — high probe cadence.

src_split.note: rows pre-ω-network-4 (formatted with 6 cols, no src) total 142; rows post-network-4 (7 cols, src=default80) total 204.

analyzer_artifact_state.tool_psi_log_analyzer_sh: MISSING (rm or never landed; closure JSON of ω-network-3 / 3b survived but file is absent on disk and absent in git)
analyzer_artifact_state.resolution: ω-network-5 ships tool/psi_calibrate_emit.hexa (.hexa-suffix per session policy) which subsumes analyzer responsibilities AND emits sourceable env exports.

distribution_variation.qualitative: MASSIVE — ubu1 idle (p95 ~1) vs hetzner/htz saturated (p95 ~98). Strong evidence that one global threshold is wrong-sized; per-host calibration justified.

policy_recap.tight: rej_ratio > 0.10 → suggested = round(p95 + 5), CAP at 95, never below current(80)

operational_clamp.rationale: ω-network-4 recommendation block notes ubu1/ubu2 (32GB RAM, cgroup MemoryMax=20G) reach OOM-kill territory BEFORE psi=80 — formula-derived high thresholds would be unsafe. Hard ceiling 70 applied to ubu1/ubu2 regardless of formula output. hetzner/htz (128GB anima-ax102) — no clamp.

per_host_results.vs_op_recommendation_n4: 70 (matches n4 op recommendation — clamp applied since formula 95 > op_ceiling 70)

calibrated_env_exports.format: Sourceable shell exports (apply via: eval "$(hexa run tool/psi_calibrate_emit.hexa --env-only)")

vs_omega_network_4_recommendation.delta: Only ubu1 differs (n4=70, n5=64). n5 value is data-derived (max observed 53.52, max+10=64) and TIGHTER than n4's anecdotal 70 — preserves OOM-safety margin while letting calibration follow distribution. ubu2/hetzner/htz match n4 exactly (clamped/capped to identical operational ceilings).

p95_p50_sensibility_per_host.verdict: low-absolute margin but real (idle host clusters near 0; max=53.52 shows the real upper extent)
narrow but high — host clustered at top → saturation

tool_added.language: hexa (delegates stat math to awk via exec for single-pass perf)
tool_added.rollback: rm /Users/ghost/core/nexus/tool/psi_calibrate_emit.hexa — ZERO blast radius (read-only over /tmp log; no daemon, no rebuild, no env mutation persisted).

constraints_honored.history_ops: no HEAD~N — pinned SHA at 82a59c5f (HEAD has moved past brief's 2ba5a57e — concurrent session committed; following parallel-cron protocol).

operator_apply_path: 2. Apply for current shell: eval "$(hexa run tool/psi_calibrate_emit.hexa --env-only)"
3. (optional) Persist: append the env-only output to ~/.zshrc / launchd plist / docker-compose env block
4. Verify: trigger a hexa_remote ssh probe and tail /tmp/hexa_remote_psi.log — src column should now read HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD_<HOST> for the calibrated hosts (rather than default80).

next_cycle_candidates.omega-network-5b: Auto-apply path: a hexa wrapper that exports the calibrated env vars at hexa_remote invocation time so operators don't have to manually source. Trade-off: requires a thin edit to hexa_remote OR a new wrapper-binary in scripts/bin/.
next_cycle_candidates.omega-network-6: Drift detector — re-run psi_calibrate_emit weekly and alert if a host's suggested value drifts by >10% from currently-applied env, indicating workload shift or hardware change.
next_cycle_candidates.omega-network-7: Log rotation — /tmp/hexa_remote_psi.log grows unbounded; size-based truncate at 10MB or weekly rotate. Currently 346 rows (~50KB) — not urgent but predictable.

git_commit.scope: EXPLICIT-PATH single commit in nexus repo
